name: OneMain Financial
description_short: Charlotte, NC OneMain Financial location on Northlake Centre Parkway provides personal loans with flexible terms for all credit profiles.
description_long:
OneMain Financial at 9821 Northlake Centre Parkway, Suite E, sits in Charlotte's Northlake business district, easily accessible from I-77. This standalone location serves Charlotte, NC residents seeking personal loan solutions during convenient weekday hours: Monday and Wednesday 8:30 AM–5:30 PM, Tuesday, Thursday, and Friday 9 AM–5:30 PM, with closed weekends.

At this Charlotte location, personal loan specialists evaluate your credit situation and discuss flexible borrowing options tailored to your needs. Call 704-399-9762 to discuss rates, terms, and pre-approval eligibility, or visit to meet with a loan officer in person.

Charlotte borrowers typically visit for quick-decision personal loans when facing unexpected expenses or consolidation needs. Bring a valid ID, recent pay stubs, and proof of residence to expedite your application. OneMain focuses on providing accessible lending to borrowers across all credit profiles.
address: 9821 Northlake Centre Pkwy Ste E, Charlotte, NC 28216

company_info.headquarters: 9821 Northlake Centre Pkwy Ste E, Charlotte, NC 28216

pros: Over 100 years in consumer lending — established, regulated, and accountable
SpeedFunds: approved borrowers can receive money in as little as 1 hour after closing via debit card
Prequalification check does not affect your credit score
No prepayment fees on any loan
Fixed rates and fixed monthly payments — no variable-rate surprises
Both secured and unsecured personal loans available ($1,500–$30,000)
After-hours branch appointments and multiple application channels (online, phone, in-branch)
cons: APR ceiling of 35.99% approaches credit card rates for less-qualified borrowers
Minimum loan of $1,500 — not suitable for very small borrowing needs
Maximum loan of $30,000 is lower than many competing online personal loan lenders
Rate floor of 11.99% is higher than what banks or credit unions offer well-qualified borrowers
Loan closing may require gathering multiple documents (ID, proof of residence, proof of income)
best_for: Borrowers with fair or imperfect credit who need $1,500–$30,000
Consumers who prefer in-person service and want to speak with a loan specialist face-to-face
Borrowers needing fast funding after approval — same-day via SpeedFunds debit disbursement
Debt consolidation or emergency expense borrowers who don't qualify at a bank or credit union
diagnosis: OneMain Financial is best for borrowers with fair-to-poor credit who need a lump-sum loan between $1,500 and $30,000 and value the option of in-person branch support or fast funding. The main caveat is cost: rates up to 35.99% APR mean this is an expensive option, and creditworthy borrowers should compare online lenders or credit unions before committing.
services: Moving, wedding, vacation, and motorcycle loans
RV, boat, pool, and funeral loans
Online prequalification with no credit score impact
meta_description: OneMain Financial at 9821 Northlake Centre Pkwy, Charlotte, NC. Quick personal loans with flexible terms for all credit types.
